// AUTO-GENERATED by kyo-ffi-codegen v1. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate via `sbt compile` after modifying the binding trait.

package kyo.example

import scala.scalajs.js
import scala.scalajs.js.annotation.*
import scala.scalajs.js.typedarray.*
import scala.scalajs.reflect.annotation.EnableReflectiveInstantiation
import kyo.ffi.*
import kyo.ffi.internal.{AbiCheck, JsRawSegment, KoffiFacade, KoffiFn, NativeLoader, StructAbiCheck}

@EnableReflectiveInstantiation final class BlockingBindingsImpl extends BlockingBindings:
    import BlockingBindingsImpl.*

    def recv(fd: Int, buf: Buffer[Byte], len: Int)(using kyo.AllowUnsafe): kyo.Fiber.Unsafe[Ffi.Outcome[Long], Any] =
        val bufU8 = kyo.ffi.internal.FfiUnsafe.expect[JsRawSegment](buf.raw.asInstanceOf[AnyRef], classOf[JsRawSegment], "JsRawSegment on JS", "kyo.example.BlockingBindings", "recv").u8a
        kyo.ffi.internal.BlockingBridge.runAsync(facade, "recv", js.Array[js.Any](fd, bufU8, len), (raw: js.Any) =>
            val retVal = raw.asInstanceOf[js.BigInt].toString.toLong
            val __errno = KoffiFacade.errno()
            val __kyoResult = retVal
            Ffi.Outcome.fromValueErrno(__kyoResult.toLong, __errno)
        )
end BlockingBindingsImpl

object BlockingBindingsImpl:
    AbiCheck.verify(1, "kyo.example.BlockingBindings")
    private val facade = KoffiFacade.load(
        NativeLoader.jsResolve("kyo_blocking"),
        Seq(
            KoffiFn("recv", "recv", "int64", Seq[js.Any]("int".asInstanceOf[js.Any], "void*".asInstanceOf[js.Any], "int".asInstanceOf[js.Any]))
        )
    )
end BlockingBindingsImpl
